english: deceleration / slowing down / the deliberate reduction of pace (in life or society)
notes: Formed from 'ent-' (reversal) + 'Schleunigung' (acceleration/speed). Often used in the context of work-life balance and the modern movement against constant busyness.

sentences.german: Viele Menschen suchen nach Entschleunigung, um dem Stress des Alltags zu entkommen.
sentences.english: Many people seek a slower pace of life to escape the stress of everyday life.

sentences.german: Entschleunigung bedeutet nicht Faulheit, sondern bewusstes Leben.
sentences.english: Slowing down does not mean laziness, but rather living consciously.
